subject: Re: St Thomas
body:
perfect..

----- Original Message ----
From: "petranemcova@mac.com" <petranemcova@mac.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, June 5, 2008 2:57:41 PM
Subject: St Thomas

I looked and on 11th I take helicopter from Necker to St Thomas (departure from Necker at 12h30) 
And then I have flight ....
11-AA 672 dep STT 2:50pm, arr MIA 5:30pm
AA 374 dep MIA 6:45pm, arr ATL 8:45pm

Do U want me to come early on 11th? Spent few hours at  St Thomas and then take the plane?

Thank U for asking Eva and Jimmy.
Love P.
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra

subject: Re: St Thomas
body:
its' only 4000 sq feet.. at 35o a sq foot. there can only be 1.5-.17 in it. try don't worry

----- Original Message ----
From: Darren indyke <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, March 3, 2007 8:17:13 AM
Subject: FW: St Thomas


Please advise.

-----Original Message-----
From: "Sharon E A Hupprich" <sharon@calypsorealty.com>
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc: "Barbara Weatherbee" <Barbara@calypsorealty.com>
Sent: 3/3/2007 7:27 AM
Subject: RE: St Thomas

Darren, assume you got the express mail package with the arch. plans which arrived at 11:30 in your office. 
Yes, I can send you more photos. will be out there showing today.
Need to know the terms of the offer. Cash closing? When? Contingencies? But in the meantime, I have to tell you that an offer clearly $700k less than list is going to insult the builder. This home is worth every penny of the $3,250,000 asking. Could it be had for $3.15? Maybe. But to start the process at $2.5 is a mistake. I do not believe it will elicit a response from the seller. Please re-think it and let me know. Thanks. 


Warm Regards, 
Sharon E. A. Hupprich 
Broker-Owner 
www.CalypsoRealty.com <http://www.calypsorealty.com/>  
Calypso Realty, P.C. 
P.O. Box 12178 St. Thomas, VI 00801-5178 
http://www.CalypsoRealty.com <http://www.calypsorealty.com/>  
voice 340 774-1620      fax 340 774 1634 
or my licensed Sales Assistant: Barbara Weatherbee 
Barbara@CalypsoRealty.com 
Living Island-style!!

________________________________

From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com]
Sent: Fri 3/2/2007 2:09 PM
To: Sharon E A Hupprich
Subject: Re: St Thomas


Let's start the process.  Bid $2.5 MM.  Thanks.

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
